subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Proclaim throughout all regions my servitude to the Sacred Threshold, and cry out my evanescence, my lowliness and my utter nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا منادی المیثاق ناد بعبودیتی للعتبه المقدسه فی الافاق و اصرخ بفناای و ذلی و
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
